arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich interested in signing German top talent Tom Bischof on free transfer
arts.sum: Tom Bischof has been hailed as one of Germany’s top young talents for many years now, with the TSG Hoffenheim youngster admired for his incredible technique and passing ability. Bayern have already inquired about the 19 y/o top talent from TSG Hoffenheim as they are interested in signing him next summer.

arts.ttl: Marseille considering move to sign Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille, second in Ligue 1 and seven points behind leaders Paris Saint-Germain, are looking to strengthen their squad in January. The club’s defence is currently seen as the…

arts.ttl: Pavlovic nears return to Bayern squad
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlovic could be back in the Bayern squad for this weekend's match against Heidenheim.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen in talks to extended Victor Boniface’s contract
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Bayer Leverkusen are in advanced talks with Victor Boniface to extend his contract by a year until 2029. Boniface’s current deal expires in 2028 but Leverkusen want…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich in “good talks” to keep Jamal Musiala and Joshua Kimmich
arts.sum: Considering that, the club intends on signing new contracts with both players as soon as possible. According to Christoph Freund, Sporting Director at Bayern, spoke on the possible contracts (captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Revealed: FIFA confirm pots for 2025 Club World Cup draw - with Chelsea, Man City and Real Madrid all set to feature in the United States tournament
arts.sum: The 2025 Club World Cup will be contested by 32 clubs from the six continental confederations and will be the first edition in this format to take place in the United States.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso explains why Kane's absence is not just an advantage for Leverkusen
arts.sum: The fact that Bayer Leverkusen will be facing a Bayern Munich side without Harry Kane isn't entirely an advantage, according to Xabi Alonso.

arts.ttl: Bayern reportedly join race for Bischof
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are the latest club to be linked with a move for Hoffenheim's Tom Bischof.

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong confirms Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool's negotiations to sign Jeremie Frimpong from Bayer Leverkusen all but confirms that Trent Alexander-Arnold will join Real Madrid . Sacha Tovalieri reports that Liverpool have been in talks to sign Frimpong for several weeks, with the Bayer Leverkusen man pinpointed as the replacement of Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: “His goal…” – Agent of former Man United transfer target clarifies his client’s future
arts.sum: Manchester United may have been linked with Sacha Boey in the past, but for now it seems a transfer is not on the agenda for the Bayern Munich full-back. The talented young Frenchman hasn’t entirely lived up to expectations during his time at Bayern so far, and it’s seemingly led to some speculation over his […] The post “His goal…” – Agent of former Man United transfer target clarifies his client’s future appeared first on CaughtOffside.
